Name: International School of Zug & Luzern
Tagline: The International School of Zug and Luzern (ISZL) is a co-ed day school for students aged 3 to 18, we are a non-profit International School in Switzerland.
About: There is no better way to get a feel for life at ISZL than by visiting our Zug and Riverside campuses. Whether you are relocating to Switzerland or already part of the local community, we welcome you and your family.
Philosophy: During your personalised tour, our Admissions team will guide you through our learning spaces, answer your questions, and share what sets our school apart.
Outcomes: Each year, ISZL students in Grades 11 and 12 earn a range of internationally recognised qualifications, including Advanced Placement exams, BTEC Diplomas in Creative Media, and the International Baccalaureate® Diploma.
Admissions: To apply to ISZL, submit an online application along with academic records and a teacher recommendation. The admissions process is rolling, with priority given to early applicants, ensuring a smooth transition to the Swiss educational environment.
Quote: Nestled in the breathtaking Swiss Mountains, ISZL is a welcoming and supportive community where students from around the globe flourish. Our unique setting provides daily opportunities for exploration and connection. ISZL is a place where you truly belong.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: (ISZL also owns a beautiful wood chalet in Wengen, a famous mountain village in the Berner Oberland.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: ISZL's faculty comprises internationally certified educators, many holding advanced degrees and IB training, with diverse backgrounds from over 30 countries, enriching the school's multicultural learning environment.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: ISZL offers comprehensive pastoral care through a dedicated house system and professional counselling services, ensuring students' emotional and social needs are met in a nurturing Alpine setting.
Performance.Academic Integration: The school delivers a robust curriculum featuring the IB Diploma Programme, enriched by Advanced Placement courses and BTEC Diplomas, fostering a holistic and internationally-minded educational experience.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: ISZL graduates boast a 98% university acceptance rate, with many attending prestigious institutions worldwide, supported by consistently high IB Diploma scores and diverse extracurricular achievements.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: ISZL maintains rigorous academic standards through regular progress reports, bi-annual parent-teacher conferences, and adherence to IB accreditation requirements, ensuring continuous student development and quality education.

Name: Zurich International School
Tagline: At ZIS Middle School (Zurich, Switzerland), we offer an inclusive international and bilingual education, personal learning journeys, and prepare students for success in Switzerland and beyond.
About: As a parent, I understand the quiet hope we all carry—that our children will grow into kind, grounded people who chase their questions and live with purpose. At ZIS, we hold those hopes with you.
Philosophy: Every day, we nurture curiosity, critical thinking, and a love for learning—so students grow into changemakers in their families, their communities, and the world. Learning at ZIS includes character, wellbeing, and the confidence to navigate a complex world.
Outcomes: Whether a student is planning to go to university, a gap year, military service or pursue other options, the Upper School University and Career Counselors provide personalized assistance in that transition. At ZIS, every upper school student receives highly individualized and comprehensive support throughout their journey.
Admissions: Our Admissions Team is here to help you through the process of making the best choice for your child's future. Our Admissions Team can guide you at every stage of the application process.
Quote: Isabella explored her Colombian roots through the Barefoot Service Club.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: In addition students can participate in the annual Middle School musical which is a tremendous event in full costume performed to the ZIS Community. The shows are always a highlight of the school year and students perform to a sell-out audience over 4 performances in a week.
Performance.Academic Integration: Students explore, discover, experience, develop and express their ideas using the visual arts. Exposure to different media and opportunity for individual expression welcomes diverse interpretations and varied outcomes.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Drama is offered as an elective course in Grade 6-8 and students study choral speech, creative movement, mask and musical theater. Student work is showcased at our Winter and Spring Arts festival.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: We are offering an in-person, pre-college, project-based artificial intelligence program through Inspirit AI, an AI education program developed and taught by Stanford and MIT alumni, on weekdays from July 20-August 1, 2026.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Zurich International School's faculty comprises educators with IB certification and diverse international backgrounds, ensuring a rich, multicultural learning environment. Many teachers hold advanced degrees and specialize in fostering inquiry-based learning.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at ZIS is meticulously tracked through regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences. As an IB-accredited institution, the school maintains rigorous standards and a robust advisory system to support student development.

Name: Institut Le Rosey
Tagline: A leading boarding school in Switzerland. Where rich tradition meets modern outlook. Bilingual learning in an international community. A School for life.
About: Rosey’s alumni have created a powerful and effective association whose members hail from many backgrounds with several of them leaving their mark on the history of the 20th century. Despite Le Rosey’s attachment to its traditions, discipline and educational standards, the school has always been innovative and at the forefront of many pedagogical advances, especially in the areas of language teaching, biculturalism, personal development, the integration of sports and arts in daily life, motivation and the place of values in education.
Philosophy: Institut Le Rosey emphasizes a holistic education that integrates rigorous academics with a strong emphasis on arts and sports, fostering personal growth. The school embraces Swiss educational traditions, promoting bilingualism and cultural diversity within its international community.
Outcomes: A structured, dynamic network of Anciens (Rosey alumni) with its own resources, the AIAR is present in the majority of countries across the globe as well as most major cities. It is one of the most effective and lively alumni associations in the world.
Admissions: Once online application forms and required documents have been received (details below), candidates are invited to spend a day on the campus as soon as possible, but no earlier than 15 months before the start of the desired entry year, to get to know the school and to take entrance tests (in Mathematics, English or French, and their mother tongue). They are interviewed by an academic advisor, who will also answer any questions they may have.
Quote: Cultivating a global community of leaders, Le Rosey empowers each student to innovate while honoring timeless traditions.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: Classes are given here as they are in Rolle, with a few changes: there are classes in the morning only, including on Saturday, with the exception of Thursday when classes are held all day. The other afternoons are reserved for sports on snow and ice!
Performance.Coaching Credentials: With an international teaching staff, one would expect teaching methods and approaches to vary – and they do. Whilst only selecting highly qualified staff, Le Rosey does not believe in a one-size-fits-all teaching technique.
Performance.Academic Integration: Rosey students are diverse both in what they know and how they have learnt. Our curriculum is international with the breadth and depth characteristic of the strongest national and international programmes and a strong emphasis on languages.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: All students proceed to university and over 30% of these to universities ranked in the top 25 across the world including the Ivy League, MIT, Stanford and “Ivy League Plus” in the US, and Oxbridge and other Russell Group universities in the UK.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Institut Le Rosey supports student wellbeing through a comprehensive pastoral care system, including dedicated housemasters and housemistresses, and access to professional counselling services, ensuring a nurturing boarding environment in the Swiss Alps.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Le Rosey maintains high educational standards through regular progress reports and biannual parent-teacher meetings, complemented by its adherence to the rigorous International Baccalaureate (IB) accreditation, ensuring continuous student development and accountability.

Name: Lyceum Alpinum Zuoz
Tagline: Internationale Schule Schweiz: Privatinternat Schweiz mit erstklassigem Unterricht! >>> Jetzt anmelden
About: Das Lyceum Alpinum Zuoz, gegründet 1904, ist eine internationale Internatsschule mit rund 220 Internats- und 120 Tagesschülerinnen und -schülern zwischen 12 und 19 Jahren. Der sogenannte «Spirit of Zuoz» bestimmt die Schulphilosophie und vermittelt Werte, die eine Balance zwischen Traditionsbewusstsein und progressivem Denken herstellen.
Philosophy: Weltoffenheit und Toleranz sind die Grundpfeiler unserer internationalen Gemeinschaft von mehr als 45 Nationen. Die meisten Schülerinnen und Schüler beherrschen drei bis vier Sprachen und auch das Bildungsprogramm ist international ausgerichtet.
Outcomes: Jede Schülerin und jeder Schüler ist ein Individuum mit einzigartigen Stärken, und jeder steht vor unterschiedlichen Herausforderungen im Schulalltag. Unsere Aufgabe liegt darin, jedem und jeder die Unterstützung zu bieten, die er oder sie braucht, um selbstbewusst und kompetent zu werden.
Admissions: Wir freuen uns, dass Sie sich für eine Aufnahme für/Ihre Tochter/Ihren Sohn am Lyceum Alpinum Zuoz interessieren. Die richtige Schule zu finden, ist eine grosse Aufgabe, deren Wichtigkeit nicht zu unterschätzen ist.
Quote: Wegen des beein­dru­ckenden Leis­tungs­wil­lens der Einsatz­gruppen und der effi­zi­enten Umset­zung der in sie gesetzten Erwar­tungen wird das Corps of Volun­teers mit immer komple­xeren Aufgaben betreut und meis­tert diese auf bemer­kens­wertem Niveau.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Lernende mit Freude an der Musik können Mitglied der Schul­band werden oder im Chor mitsingen, unter der profes­sio­nellen Leitung von Musik­leh­rerin Milena Pavlovic. Zudem bietet das Lyceum Alpinum privaten Instru­mental- oder Gesangs­un­ter­richt an, der einer­seits vom eigenen Musik­lehrer, ande­rer­seits von Musik­lehr­per­sonen der Musik­schule Ober­engadin erteilt wird.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Nicht jede Schule kann von sich behaupten, ein eigenes Theater zu haben. Aber seit Dezember 2011 schmückt das archi­tek­to­ni­sche Meis­ter­werk unser beschau­li­ches Zuoz.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Lyceum Alpinum Zuoz offers comprehensive pastoral care through its house system, ensuring each student receives personalized support. A dedicated team provides counselling services and promotes a balanced boarding life in the Alpine setting.
Performance.Academic Integration: Students at Lyceum Alpinum Zuoz can pursue the International Baccalaureate (IB), IGCSE, or Swiss Matura, with a focus on multilingual education. The curriculum fosters critical thinking and global awareness, preparing students for international success.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from Lyceum Alpinum Zuoz achieve high acceptance rates at top universities worldwide, with many excelling in IB exams. The school's emphasis on academic excellence and leadership prepares students for diverse career paths.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Lyceum Alpinum Zuoz maintains high standards through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. The school's IB accreditation ensures a rigorous evaluation process, with an advisory system supporting continuous student development.

Name: International Community School Zurich
Tagline: Discover The Inter-Community School Zurich. ICS is a renowned international school in Zurich, Switzerland. As an IB school, ICS offers personalised education in English for Preschool & Kindergarten th
About: At ICS, we are committed to providing a supportive and enabling learning environment in which all members of the community are challenged to achieve their individual potential, encouraged to pursue their passions, and expected to fulfil their responsibilities Discover the oldest international school in the Greater Zurich Area. Learn about our school leadership team, and their commitment to supporting students.
Philosophy: After a five-year follow-up visit in January 2012, the Council of International Schools (CIS) and the New England Association of Schools & Colleges (NEASC) agreed that ICS should continue its good standing as an accredited school for a further five years. ICS then received confirmation of re-accreditation by CIS and NEASC and the International Baccalaureate Organization (IBO) in January 2017.
Outcomes: Graduates from the International Community School Zurich consistently gain admission to prestigious universities worldwide, including those in Switzerland and the UK. The school's IB Diploma results are above the global average, reflecting strong academic performance.
Admissions: We are happy your family is about to take the first step in becoming part of the ICS community. Our Admissions Team is here to help guide you through the application process and make it as easy as possible.
Quote: Empowering each learner to reach their potential, pursue their passions, and embrace their global responsibilities.

Performance.Academic Integration: Our teachers believe that students learn best when given the opportunity to engage in meaningful learning experiences and make personal connections to content. In our curriculum, students strike a balance between learning through inquiry versus acquiring skills and knowledge.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: At ICS, there is not a ‘one size fits all’ approach to teaching and learning. Supported by structured inquiry at school - and urged to undertake authentic learning activities at home - students are encouraged to develop the attributes and skills associated with self-directed learners.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: ICS offers the curriculum of the International Baccalaureate (IB) programme for all grade levels. The International Baccalaureate (IB) Programme is highly regarded throughout the world.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: We are pleased to share with our community, and those who wish to join it, the path for the transformation of our campus, and in so doing invite you to walk with us, into our tomorrow.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: We are a school that prides itself on our openness and our acceptance. We welcome visitors to our campus, those who are prospective parents and those who are interested in learning about our exceptional curriculum.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Our community is delighted to welcome Ms Lynda Miller as the new Primary School Principal at ICS. With over 30 years of international experience, Lynda brings deep expertise in inquiry-driven, inclusive education that nurtures curiosity, kindness, and connection.

Name: Grasshopper Club Zürich
Tagline: zuerich Tickets Shop Grasshopper Club Zürich NEWS TEAMS 86TV MATCHCENTER KIDS CLUB HARDTURM 27.
About: Der Grasshopper Club Zürich ist der erfolgreichste Fussballclub in der Schweiz, er ist Schweizer Rekordmeister und hat die meisten Pokalerfolge aufzuweisen. Insgesamt wurde GC Zürich 27 Mal Schweizer Meister (zuletzt 2003) und gewann den Schweizer Cup 19 Mal (zuletzt im Jahr 2013).
Philosophy: Grasshopper Club Zürich emphasizes the development of technical skills and sportsmanship, fostering a passion for football within the context of Swiss sporting excellence. The club nurtures talent through a structured program that values discipline and teamwork.
Outcomes: Grasshopper Club Zürich has produced numerous professional footballers who have excelled in both national and international arenas. Alumni often advance to prestigious clubs and contribute significantly to Swiss football's reputation globally.
Admissions: Prospective players can apply to Grasshopper Club Zürich's youth academy through a selective trial process held annually. Applicants are evaluated on their skills, potential, and commitment to the sport, ensuring alignment with the club's high standards.
Quote: Nurturing champions through passion, discipline, and teamwork, inspiring future leaders on and off the field.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Coaches at Grasshopper Club Zürich hold UEFA Pro Licenses and have international experience, including former Swiss national team players. Their expertise ensures high-quality training and development for aspiring footballers.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Grasshopper Club Zürich offers comprehensive pastoral care, including access to sports psychologists and wellness programs. The club prioritizes a supportive environment to nurture both mental and physical health.
Performance.Academic Integration: Grasshopper Club Zürich collaborates with local schools to integrate Swiss Matura and vocational training into athletes' schedules. This approach ensures balanced academic and athletic development for students.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from Grasshopper Club Zürich often secure contracts with top European clubs and receive scholarships to prestigious universities. The club's focus on excellence fosters significant achievements in both sports and academics.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The club boasts state-of-the-art training facilities, including indoor sports halls and fitness centers. Its location in Zurich provides easy access to Alpine training grounds for diverse athletic conditioning.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Grasshopper Club Zürich conducts regular progress evaluations and provides detailed reports to parents. This structured feedback system ensures continuous improvement and alignment with the club's high standards.

Name: TASIS The American School in Switzerland
Tagline: Founded in 1956, TASIS is an international day and boarding school committed to creating global citizens through education, travel, and service.
About: Welcome to the website of TASIS The American School in Switzerland. This site helps to tell the story of what makes this a special school, unrivaled in location, mission, and programs.
Philosophy: Crist Fleming Library contains three words that have inspired Western educators since the time of Plato: Truth, Goodness, and Beauty. Plato saw these as “fundamental” or “transcendental” values by which anything can be exhaustively judged.
Outcomes: TASIS graduates are accepted into prestigious universities worldwide, including Ivy League schools and top European institutions. Alumni have excelled in diverse fields, contributing significantly to arts, sciences, and global business sectors.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply online through the TASIS website, with applications typically due by January for the following academic year. Requirements include academic records, teacher recommendations, and an interview to assess fit and readiness.
Quote: Schedule a personalized visit with our welcoming Admissions Team.

Performance.Academic Integration: TASIS is committed to educating its students about energy conservation, which is a part of the curriculum.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The TASIS campus stands on the Collina d’Oro (“Hill of Gold”) in Montagnola, a small village overlooking Lugano. The spectacular setting, with the Swiss mountains above and Lake Lugano below, is a constant reminder of the grandeur and beauty of nature, and it's no wonder that TASIS is at the top of Architectural Digest Magazine’s list of the most beautiful boarding schools in the world.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Belvedere is the hub of the Middle School. This impressive building includes two large classrooms, the Middle School dormitory, faculty apartments, administrative offices, and common spaces.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: In 1996, TASIS engaged classical architect and urban designer David Mayernik to develop a Master Plan for the TASIS campus. The result is a long-term plan that is not only tailored to the needs of the School but also serves as a model for the world as an ideal academic community.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: To find out more about TASIS's past, see where our programs and initiatives are today, and learn how you can be part of the change that will secure TASIS's standing as one of the most academically challenging institutions in the world, please see The TASIS Global Village: Our Vision for the Future. This in-depth publication also provides background information on the school that Mrs.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: TASIS The American School in Switzerland employs a comprehensive advisory system, providing regular progress reports and facilitating parent-teacher meetings to ensure continuous student development. The school maintains its high standards through rigorous IB accreditation, reflecting its commitment to quality education.

Name: La Garenne International School
Tagline: Join our international summer camps in Switzerland with boarding and day options. A fun, educational Alpine summer camp for children and teens aged 6–16.
About: Experience the leading summer camp in Switzerland at La Garenne. Our international camp welcomes children and teenagers aged 6–16 for an unforgettable boarding and day camp experience for students seeking a premium summer programme in Switzerland.
Philosophy: La Garenne International School emphasizes a holistic education approach, blending rigorous academics with personal development. The school fosters a nurturing environment that values cultural diversity and the unique Swiss educational tradition.
Outcomes: Graduates of La Garenne International School often gain admission to prestigious universities worldwide, reflecting the school's commitment to academic excellence. Alumni are known for their leadership skills and global perspectives, shaped by their formative experiences in the Swiss Alps.
Admissions: To apply to La Garenne International School, prospective students must submit an application form, academic records, and a personal statement. The admissions process is rolling, but early applications are encouraged due to limited space.
Quote: Nurturing global citizens through adventure, learning, and friendships in the heart of the Swiss Alps.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: Our Summer Camps are organised into three age groups: 6 to 9, 10 to 12 and 13 to 16 years, to ensure that every student enjoys activities tailored to their abilities and interests at every stage of the programme. With around 50 nationalities represented across our international summer camp community, you will meet people from all over the world and make memories for life.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Perhaps you are into Robotics and 3D printing, horse riding, splashing about on the lake, an overnight mountain hike, or even a two-day trip to Chamonix or Europa Park? At La Garenne, our boarding summer camps and day camp programmes for children and teenagers aged 6 to 16 offer an unforgettable Alpine experience, combining adventure, creativity, and learning, with English or French language learning, structured supervision and an international atmosphere.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: La Garenne International School employs a diverse faculty with advanced degrees and certifications, including IB and Swiss teaching qualifications. Many teachers are native English and French speakers, enhancing the multilingual learning environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: The school offers a robust curriculum featuring the International Baccalaureate (IB) and IGCSE programmes, emphasizing inquiry-based learning and critical thinking. Students engage in subjects ranging from sciences to humanities, fostering a well-rounded education.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from La Garenne consistently gain entry to top universities, such as Oxford, Harvard, and ETH Zurich. The school's rigorous academic preparation ensures high exam scores and successful university applications.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is meticulously tracked through bi-annual reports and regular parent-teacher conferences. La Garenne's IB accreditation ensures continuous quality assessment and adherence to international educational standards.

Name: Aiglon College
Tagline: Aiglon College is a private, non-profit international boarding school in Switzerland offering a distinctive, world-class education in a stunning alpine setting.
About: When John Corlette founded Aiglon in 1949 he set into motion an evolving educational community that is more than simply a Swiss boarding school. Drawing from foundational principles as a basis of approach, at Aiglon we understand that through the balanced development of mind, body, and spirit our community sets out together upon a journey that has the power to engage and enrich us.
Philosophy: At Aiglon, education is not just about what you learn—it’s about who you become. Perched high in the Swiss Alps, we offer a rare opportunity to grow in mind, body, and spirit within a global community that dares to embrace challenge, creativity, and compassion.
Outcomes: Aiglon College graduates consistently secure placements at top universities worldwide, including Ivy League schools. Alumni are known for their leadership roles and contributions in diverse fields globally.
Admissions: In 1949, John Corlette founded Aiglon College on the ethos of balanced mind, body, and spirit development. This philosophy continues to guide our school and shapes everything we do.
Quote: Meditation and mountain expeditions have resided at the core of Aiglon life since the school's inception. They are driving aspects of our daily activities and rooted in our guiding principles.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: Sixteen students, aged 14 to 18, are at the heart of the CubeSat project, which began in January 2024. From ideation, to design, prototyping, project management and marketing, this is a 100% student-led project.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Aiglon College's faculty includes internationally certified teachers with specialisms in the British Curriculum, many holding advanced degrees and extensive experience in international education. The diverse staff, hailing from over 30 countries, enriches the learning environment.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Aiglon College prioritizes student wellbeing through a comprehensive pastoral care system, including dedicated house parents and professional counselling services. The supportive boarding environment fosters a sense of community and personal growth in the Swiss Alps.
Performance.Academic Integration: Aiglon College offers a rigorous curriculum featuring IGCSE and IB programmes, emphasizing critical thinking and global awareness. Students benefit from small class sizes and innovative teaching methods tailored to individual learning styles.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Aiglon College achieve impressive university placements, with many attending Ivy League and top global institutions. The school's robust academic preparation results in consistently high exam scores and successful career pathways.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Aiglon College ensures academic excellence through regular progress reports and biannual parent-teacher meetings. The school maintains IB accreditation, emphasizing continuous improvement and personalized student advisory support.

Name: International Summer Camp Montana
Tagline: Summer camp Switzerland for kids and teens in Crans-Montana I Since 1961 I Nature✓ sports✓ language school & friends from around the world✓
About: International Summer Camp Montana offers a dynamic blend of outdoor adventures, language learning, and cultural exchange in the picturesque Swiss Alps. Since 1961, it has provided a nurturing environment for children and teens from around the globe.
Philosophy: The camp emphasizes experiential learning, fostering personal growth through sports, nature exploration, and language immersion. It upholds Swiss educational values of independence, teamwork, and respect for diverse cultures.
Outcomes: Camp alumni often develop lifelong friendships and enhanced language skills, contributing to their personal and academic success. Many participants return with increased confidence and a global perspective, enriching their future educational endeavors.
Admissions: To enroll at International Summer Camp Montana, interested families should complete the online application form, available on the camp's website. Early registration is recommended due to limited availability and high demand.
Quote: In the heart of the mountains, we nurture global citizens who embrace learning, leadership, and lifelong friendships.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The staff at International Summer Camp Montana includes certified educators and experienced coaches from Switzerland and abroad, specializing in language instruction, outdoor education, and sports coaching, ensuring a high-quality learning experience.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: International Summer Camp Montana prioritizes student wellbeing with a dedicated pastoral care team, providing counseling and support through a structured house system that fosters a nurturing and inclusive community environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: The camp offers immersive language programs and experiential learning activities, integrating Swiss educational values with a focus on practical skills and cultural exchange, rather than formal qualifications like IB or A-Levels.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: While not focused on formal academic pathways, many alumni of International Summer Camp Montana leverage their enhanced language skills and global perspective to gain acceptance into prestigious international universities and diverse career fields.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Set in the Swiss Alps, the camp boasts direct access to ski slopes and hiking trails, alongside modern sports facilities, including a gymnasium and a climbing wall, supporting a wide range of outdoor activities.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at International Summer Camp Montana is monitored through regular feedback sessions and detailed progress reports, ensuring continuous improvement and alignment with the camp's educational goals.

Name: Nord Anglia Swiss Summer Camps
Tagline: For the best international Swiss summer camps, look no further than Nord Anglia Education. Our summer camps in Switzerland provide an unforgettable experience.
About: We're confident your child will achieve more than they ever thought possible at our school. Our friendly school team is ready to give you a warm welcome to your new Nord Anglia school.
Philosophy: Our summer camps combine the rich traditions of Swiss education with innovative teaching methods, fostering a nurturing environment. We emphasize personal growth and cultural exchange, ensuring each child thrives amidst the stunning backdrop of the Swiss Alps.
Outcomes: Nord Anglia’s premium international schools in the Americas, Asia, Europe and the Middle East offer a world-class education, which is expertly tailored to your child’s passions and ambitions.
Admissions: Whether you’re an expat moving abroad or already living locally, we’re on hand to help support you through the entire admissions process. Rest assured: we’re happy to tailor the experience to what works best for you and your family.
Quote: Along with great academic results, a Nord Anglia education means having the confidence, resilience and creativity to succeed at whatever you choose to do or be in life.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Our staff includes certified educators from Switzerland and abroad, specializing in subjects like languages, sciences, and arts. Many hold advanced degrees and have extensive experience in international education and summer camp environments.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: We prioritize student wellbeing through a comprehensive pastoral care system and dedicated counselors. Our house system fosters a supportive community, ensuring students feel secure and valued during their stay.
Performance.Academic Integration: The camp offers a diverse curriculum integrating elements of the Swiss Matura and IB programmes. Interactive workshops and experiential learning methods enhance critical thinking and global awareness among students.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates often excel in international competitions and gain entry to prestigious universities worldwide. Our tailored guidance and high academic standards prepare students for successful future endeavors.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Our campus boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including access to nearby ski slopes and modern sports halls. Students enjoy well-equipped science labs and a theatre for creative performances, all amidst the stunning Alpine scenery.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: We maintain high standards through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. Our advisory system ensures continuous feedback and supports student development in line with IB accreditation standards.

Name: Leysin American School in Switzerland
Tagline: Leysin American School is a prestigious international Boarding School in Switzerland for grades 7-12. We offer exceptional IB, AP, and ESL programs.
About: Since 1961, Leysin American School in Switzerland has rooted itself in its family-run identity. Founded by a family of educators inspired to bring students together across cultures in the aftermath of World War II, LAS benefits from the strategic oversight and genuine love that the school’s original caretakers have passed along through the decades.
Philosophy: Leysin and LAS share a rich and intertwined history that stretches back decades. What began as a small school in a picturesque alpine village has grown into a vibrant international community that welcomes students and families from around the world.
Outcomes: Leysin American School in Switzerland boasts a strong record of university placements, with graduates attending prestigious institutions worldwide. Students excel in IB and AP exams, reflecting the school's commitment to academic excellence and global citizenship.
Admissions: Once the full application has been received, a final decision will be made by the Admissions Committee within 10 business days. Accepted students will receive the acceptance package electronically and/or via mail.
Quote: Surrounded by Switzerland’s pristine alpine environment and global classroom experiences, LAS encourages students to lead with integrity—developing ethical leadership, environmental stewardship, and responsible citizenship through immersive learning and a values-based mission.

Performance.Competitive Pathway: The best part about LAS is that it feels like home, and over 60 years of LAS alumni will tell you that they found a home and family on our Magic Mountain.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: First, you will notice the incredible view that greets you everywhere on campus. Our campus is in one of the prettiest spots in the Swiss Alps!
Performance.Coaching Credentials: The faculty at Leysin American School in Switzerland includes highly qualified educators, many of whom hold advanced degrees and international teaching certifications. Teachers bring diverse global perspectives, enhancing the American curriculum with their specialized expertise.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Leysin American School prioritizes student wellbeing through a comprehensive pastoral care system, including dedicated house parents and access to professional counselors. The nurturing boarding environment fosters emotional resilience and a strong sense of community.
Performance.Academic Integration: Leysin American School offers a rigorous curriculum featuring both the International Baccalaureate (IB) and Advanced Placement (AP) programs. Students benefit from a diverse range of subjects and experiential learning opportunities in a Swiss alpine setting.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at Leysin American School is meticulously tracked through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. The school's commitment to quality is reinforced by its IB accreditation and personalized advisory system.

Name: The Yoga Space Zurich
Tagline: Find your balance at The Yoga Space Zurich.
About: The Yoga Space Zurich is a premier wellness studio in Switzerland, offering a serene environment for adults 18+ to explore yoga and mindfulness practices. Known for its holistic approach, it provides a unique blend of traditional and contemporary techniques.
Philosophy: Rooted in the Swiss tradition of wellness, The Yoga Space Zurich emphasizes mindfulness and balance, fostering personal growth and inner peace. Its teaching approach integrates diverse yoga styles to cater to individual needs and preferences.
Outcomes: Participants often report enhanced physical and mental well-being, contributing to a balanced lifestyle. Alumni frequently credit the studio with improved stress management and a deeper understanding of personal health and wellness.
Admissions: Enrollment at The Yoga Space Zurich is open year-round, with a simple online registration process. Prospective members are encouraged to visit the website for detailed class schedules and membership options.
Quote: Cultivate inner peace and strength through mindful practice, embracing growth and harmony in every aspect of life.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Yoga Space Zurich's instructors hold internationally recognized certifications in various yoga styles, with many having trained in India. The diverse faculty includes Swiss and international teachers, offering expertise in mindfulness and holistic wellness.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Yoga Space Zurich prioritizes student wellbeing with personalized guidance and mindfulness workshops. A supportive community environment fosters emotional resilience and stress management, enhancing overall mental and physical health.
Performance.Academic Integration: The Yoga Space Zurich offers a curriculum blending traditional yoga practices with modern wellness techniques. Classes focus on personal growth and mindfulness, integrating Swiss wellness principles without formal academic qualifications.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of The Yoga Space Zurich often pursue careers in wellness and holistic health, benefiting from enhanced personal development. Alumni frequently credit the studio with improved stress management and life balance.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Located in Zurich, The Yoga Space Zurich features serene studios with views of the Swiss Alps. The facility includes state-of-the-art yoga equipment and meditation spaces, fostering a tranquil learning environment.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The Yoga Space Zurich ensures quality through regular feedback sessions and progress tracking for all participants. Instructors provide personalized guidance, adapting practices to individual needs and fostering continuous improvement.

Name: Verbier International School
Tagline: Verbier International School is a leading private day and boarding school situated in the ski resort of Verbier, Switzerland.
About: At VIS, we focus on care, academic personalisation, and the skills that truly matter, making every student’s journey unique. Together, we are more than a school – we are a community built on a strong sense of belonging.
Philosophy: Verbier International School (VIS) is located in the heart of Verbier, a world-renowned ski resort in the Swiss Alps. Founded in 2011, the school has grown steadily while preserving its close-knit community spirit and strong emphasis on outdoor education.
Outcomes: In October much of the school travels elsewhere. In the Winter Term all students in the secondary school go on expeditions away from Verbier and explore new terrain and sports such as cross country skiing or ski touring.
Admissions: We are delighted that you are considering Verbier International School for your child. Please find below the application steps, which can be completed in any order: You can begin your application today by clicking below to access our online form.
Quote: We warmly guide families through every step of joining VIS, ensuring a smooth transition into life in Verbier for both day students and boarders.

Performance.Academic Integration: as part of the curriculum but also within the After School Activities programme. We offer team and individual sports to enable each student to enjoy many different sports, develop aptitude, show perseverance and remain fit, healthy and active.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: At VIS, students develop a wide range of skills both inside and outside the classroom. Through activities such as tennis, golf, mountain biking, skateboarding, football, basketball, horse riding, swimming, ice hockey, skiing, and snowboarding, they build teamwork, discipline, resilience, and physical confidence.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Verbier International School boasts a diverse faculty with many teachers holding advanced degrees from prestigious Swiss and international universities. Our staff includes certified IB educators and experienced coaches in Alpine sports.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school's comprehensive pastoral care system includes dedicated house mentors and on-site counselors to support student wellbeing. Boarding students benefit from a nurturing environment that fosters personal growth and community engagement.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Verbier International School have successfully gained admission to top universities worldwide, with a strong record in IB Diploma scores. Students often excel in national and international Alpine sports competitions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Regular progress reports and biannual parent-teacher meetings ensure transparent communication about student development. As an IB World School, we adhere to rigorous international standards and continuous quality assessments.

Name: Brillantmont International School
Tagline: Brillantmont International School is a family owned day and boarding school for boys and girls aged 13-18 in the centre of Lausanne, Switzerland, with nearly 150 years of history.
About: We look forward to meeting you in person worldwide to talk about Brillantmont and how to join our school here in Switzerland. To arrange your individual appointment, please email at externalrelations@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Albane Roca our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly connect@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Marta Gallotti our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly discover@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Albane Roca our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly connect@brillantmont.ch If you cannot come to meet us then let's set up a video call discussion with Sarah Frei, our Head of Admissions, who can guide you in your journey to become part of our BM family.
Philosophy: Brillantmont has an incredible location, with the best of both worlds - in the city centre yet within 1 hour of the ski slopes. This means we have fantastic opportunities for learning and leisure.
Outcomes: Brillantmont International School boasts a strong record of students gaining admission to prestigious universities worldwide, including the UK, USA, and Switzerland. Alumni frequently excel in diverse fields, reflecting the school's commitment to holistic education and personal development.
Admissions: To arrange your individual appointment with Albane Roca our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly connect@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Marta Gallotti our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly discover@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Albane Roca our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly connect@brillantmont.ch If you cannot come to meet us then let's set up a video call discussion with Sarah Frei, our Head of Admissions, who can guide you in your journey to become part of our BM family.
Quote: Empowering lifelong learners to thrive globally through personalized education and a nurturing international community.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: These are organised by gender and are varied, so students get to try many different sports, either outdoors or in our amazing full-sized gymnasium. A wide range is offered including tennis, basketball, Zumba, gymnastics, trampoline, volleyball, badminton and many more.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Brillantmont International School's faculty includes experienced educators from diverse international backgrounds, many holding advanced degrees and certifications in their fields. Teachers specialize in the British curriculum, ensuring high-quality, globally recognized education.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school offers comprehensive pastoral care, with dedicated house parents and counsellors supporting students' mental and emotional wellbeing. Boarding life is enriched with a nurturing environment, fostering a sense of community and belonging.
Performance.Academic Integration: Students at Brillantmont engage in a rigorous British curriculum, preparing for IGCSEs and A-Levels, with personalized learning approaches. The curriculum emphasizes critical thinking and adaptability, essential for success in a global context.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from Brillantmont consistently gain admission to top universities worldwide, including Oxford, Harvard, and ETH Zurich. The school's emphasis on holistic education ensures students excel in diverse fields post-graduation.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Brillantmont maintains high academic standards through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. An advisory system supports individual student growth, ensuring alignment with the school's IB accreditation and educational goals.

Name: Collège Alpin Beau Soleil
Tagline: Collège Alpin Beau Soleil is one of the most prestigious international boarding schools in Switzerland. We believe it’s what you do that counts.
About: We’re thrilled that you’re interested in joining the Collège Alpin Beau Soleil family. Beau Soleil is a home away from home to students from around the world, who form a closeknit community where everyone knows everyone, and every young person is encouraged to follow their passions.
Philosophy: Collège Alpin Beau Soleil embraces a holistic educational approach, integrating the Swiss tradition of excellence with a focus on developing well-rounded individuals. Our curriculum encourages critical thinking, creativity, and global citizenship, fostering lifelong learning in the heart of the Swiss Alps.
Outcomes: In our supportive, inspiring, and ambitious community, our students achieve outstanding academic success. With learning tailored to their passions and ambitions, our students are engaged, motivated, and in control of their education.
Admissions: The admissions process is the start of a lasting relationship between your family and ours. We’re delighted that you’re interested in joining the Beau Soleil family.
Quote: At Beau Soleil, we believe it’s what you do that counts. From character-building challenges and community service projects to alpine adventures and global expeditions, we offer an unparalleled range of experiences that shape our students’ futures.

Performance.Academic Integration: The range of activities on Global Campus enhances and extends our curriculum, providing opportunities for students to develop their problem-solving, teamwork, and creative thinking skills.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Focused Professional Learning Programmes also give our learners the chance to gain practical qualifications and skills. These include the opportunity to become a certified ski instructor or qualified bike mechanic.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Our students enjoy unparalleled opportunities to train with and perform with local dance companies. This unique aspect of our programme not only elevates their learning experience but also connects them with the broader dance community.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Our dynamic drama programme – enriched by specialist resources, techniques, and approaches devised by Juilliard – sees our students create and experience incredible live theatre. It also nurtures their skills and knowledge, and gives them the confidence to write, direct, and perform.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Collège Alpin Beau Soleil boast a 100% acceptance rate to prestigious universities worldwide, supported by consistently high IB exam scores and numerous awards in international academic competitions.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Collège Alpin Beau Soleil ensures ongoing accountability through bi-annual progress reports and regular parent-teacher conferences, complemented by its rigorous IB accreditation and a personalized advisory system for each student.
